notes: F5 PR-axis live-fire harness on real memd-server (HttpRoutineSubstrate). Routines plant via /memory/store with kind=Procedural + per-routine tag (f5-routine-{routine_id}); invocations search by tag + kind=Procedural + scope=Project + status=Active; cache hits pay ROUTINE_INVOCATION_COST (10), misses pay BASELINE_RETRIEVAL_COST (100). Content uses a unique alphanumeric token slot (`r{idx}` + `r{idx}end`) so server-side redundancy_key dedup never collapses two routines that differ only in numeric suffix. Sessions are no-ops because real memd-server persists via SQLite; live-fire S1→S2+ semantics hold by construction. total_savings = routine_count × invocations_per_routine × (BASELINE - INVOCATION) = r·i·90 on a perfect-cache substrate.
